findings.evidence: GroupLike is defined in Mathlib.RingTheory.Coalgebra.GroupLike under `variable [CommSemiring R] ... [Coalgebra R A]`. IsGeometricallyReduced requires [CommRing R] [Ring A], not Field. The outer variable (line 31) fixes [Field k] [CommRing A], both strictly stronger than needed for this definition.
findings.fix: Define IsUnipotent outside or before the [Field k] variable scope, or introduce a separate `variable` block with [CommSemiring k] [Ring A] [HopfAlgebra k A] for the Unipotent section. Concretely: `def IsUnipotent {k A : Type*} [CommSemiring k] [Ring A] [HopfAlgebra k A] (g : GroupLike k A) : Prop := IsNilpotent ((g : A) - 1)`.
findings.issue: IsUnipotent carries [Field k] [CommRing A] from the outer variable block (line 31) when GroupLike k A requires only CommSemiring k and Coalgebra k A, and IsNilpotent ((g : A) - 1) requires only Ring A. The same over-strong context propagates to isUnipotent_one (line 54).

findings.evidence: Lean 4 class inheritance registers the parent projection as an instance automatically (same pattern as `LeftCancelSemigroup.toSemigroup` etc. in Mathlib.Algebra.Group.Defs). The body `SemisimpleGroup.toReductiveGroup` confirms this is just the auto-projection.
findings.fix: Delete lines 76–78; Lean 4's class-extension mechanism already synthesizes `ReductiveGroup k A` from `[SemisimpleGroup k A]` via the auto-generated `toReductiveGroup` projection.
findings.issue: SemisimpleGroup.instReductiveGroup is redundant. `class SemisimpleGroup extends ReductiveGroup k A` (line 68) causes Lean 4 to auto-register `SemisimpleGroup.toReductiveGroup` as an instance; the explicit instance restates the same projection.

summary: IsUnipotent and isUnipotent_one inherit [Field k] [CommRing A] from the outer variable block, but the definition only requires [CommSemiring k] [Ring A] [HopfAlgebra k A] — GroupLike needs only CommSemiring, and IsNilpotent on a difference needs only Ring. The explicit instance SemisimpleGroup.instReductiveGroup duplicates what Lean 4 class extension auto-generates.
